title: Phan Thiet、Binh Thuan — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Phan Thiet、Binh Thuan的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Phan Thiet是Binh Thuan的一個城市，人口約350,000。Home to the famous Mui Ne sand dunes and a growing beach resort scene, this coastal city offers some of the most affordable beachfront living in Southeast Asia.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
